videos.headline: Alabama bounces back with win over Eastern Illinois
videos.description: Alabama bounces back from its loss to Oklahoma with an easy win over Eastern Illinois.

videos.headline: Kalen DeBoer describes No. 10 Alabama's depth vs. Eastern Illinois
videos.description: DeBoer reflects on the Crimson Tide's performance and discusses how the depth of the younger talent on the roster led them to the victory against the Panthers.

videos.headline: Tim Keenan III discuss leadership after No. 10 Bama's win vs. Eastern Illinois
videos.description: Keenan III makes good on the challenge the Crimson Tide's defensive coordinators gave them prior to the game and reflects on leading the defense as they prep for the Iron Bowl.
